auto_save.description: Drafts are saved to your computer
auto_save.has_saved: You have saved notices. Would you like to continue writing?

edit_description: You only have 15 minutes to edit the original notice. However, you can always write an English version.
edit_disabled: Editing original notice is disabled! 👇 Why not try an additional announcement?

photo.description: The first of the attached photos is set as the representative photo.

tags.description: Separate them with a space; you don't need to type #.

description.content: Feel free to promote your event in the event notice.
description.example: Ex) festivals, exhibitions, performances, seminars, lectures, workshops
description.title: 🎈 Event notice

description.content: Notices that are not part of a recruitment or event notices.
description.example: Ex) GIST House notices, student association notices, notifications, etc.
description.title: 🔔 General notice

description.content: If you're looking to recruit people to your club, group, or event, try creating a recruitment announcement.
description.example: Ex) club recruitment, student association recruitment, Infinite Challenge team member recruitment, contests, competitions, etc.
description.title: 🎯 Recruiting notice

submit_description:
You can edit your notice in 15 mins. 
 Please double-check your content before submitting.

toasts.additional_notice_fail: Failed to post additional notice. Please try posting it again.
toasts.international_additional_fail: Failed to post English additional notice. Please try posting it again.
toasts.international_fail: Failed to post English version. Please try posting it again.
toasts.push_delayed: Users will receive a push notification after 15 minutes. If it's urgent, you can use Send Notification button in your notice page.

validations.body_too_long: Please enter body content within {{bodyMaxLength}} characters
validations.both_body_too_long: Please enter both Korean and English content within {{bodyMaxLength}} characters
validations.deadline_invalid: Please set the deadline after the current time
validations.english_body_too_long: Please enter English body content within {{bodyMaxLength}} characters
validations.korean_additional_required: Please write a Korean additional notice
validations.korean_body_too_long: Please enter Korean body content within {{bodyMaxLength}} characters
validations.title_too_long: Please enter a title of no more than {{titleMaxLength}} characters
